input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 18 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "general", "count": 5, "message": "5 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 4, "message": "4 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 3, "message": "3 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 280, "current_utilization": 30, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Toronto General Hospital has 18 incoming patients. Activate the crisis team for the 4 mental health patients and an infection control alert for the 3 GI patients. Capacity is stable for the next 2 hours; no diversions are recommended at this time.
